title: Add various transport support to buildah from
body:
buildah from now supports pulling images using the following transports:
docker-archive, oci-archive, and dir.

Fixes issue https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/511

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: BTW Can podman do this now, for podman pull?
@rhatdan yeah, podman pull has this support already.
LGTM, thx for the nit fix @umohnani8

:pushpin: Commit cf59a8c has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat cf59a8c1ab4729bf5e7222dcb54b34eef568ed18 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

@ipbabble I think calls for a new blog, about using buildah to build containers based on content in docker storage?  Perhaps on oci images on your local disk.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I think it is time to release a new buildah with this new support, but lets merge Multi From support.
